languages.text: "Отыщу заслуживающее место в своей коллекции и сохраню в неизменности на века. Едва ли ты или другие представители твоего вида могли даже осознать ценность этого феномена — я же отмечу его значимость так, как оно того заслуживает".

traits.locale_text: "Отыщу заслуживающее место в своей коллекции и сохраню в неизменности на века. Едва ли ты или другие представители твоего вида могли даже осознать ценность этого феномена — я же отмечу его значимость так, как оно того заслуживает".

languages.text: "I will find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, will mark its significance as it deserves."
languages.original_text: "Отыщу заслуживающее место в своей коллекции и сохраню в неизменности на века. Едва ли ты или другие представители твоего вида могли даже осознать ценность этого феномена — я же отмечу его значимость так, как оно того заслуживает".

traits.locale_text: "I will find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, will mark its significance as it deserves."

"I shall find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You or any other of your kind could scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, shall honour its significance as it deserves."

"I will find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, will mark its significance as it deserves."

"I shall find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, shall honour its significance as it deserves."

"I will find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, will mark its significance as it deserves."

"I will find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, will mark its significance as it deserves."

languages.text: "Ich werde in meiner Sammlung einen würdigen Platz für dich finden, der in den kommenden Jahrhunderten unverändert bleiben wird. Du und andere deiner Art können den Wert dieses Phänomens nur selten erfassen. Ich hingegen werde seine Bedeutung angemessen würdigen."
languages.original_text: "I will find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, will mark its significance as it deserves."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde in meiner Sammlung einen würdigen Platz für dich finden, der in den kommenden Jahrhunderten unverändert bleiben wird. Du und andere deiner Art können den Wert dieses Phänomens nur selten erfassen. Ich hingegen werde seine Bedeutung angemessen würdigen."

languages.text: “我会在我的收藏中为它找到一个合适的位置，并让它历经数个世纪依然如故。你们这类种族根本无法理解这一现象的价值。而我，自会给予它应得的尊重。”
languages.original_text: "I will find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, will mark its significance as it deserves."

traits.locale_text: “我会在我的收藏中为它找到一个合适的位置，并让它历经数个世纪依然如故。你们这类种族根本无法理解这一现象的价值。而我，自会给予它应得的尊重。”

languages.text: « Je lui trouverai une place de choix dans ma collection et je le préserverai de tout changement pour les siècles à venir. Vous, ainsi que toute votre espèce, pouvez à peine mesurer la valeur de ce phénomène. Pour ma part, je saurai lui donner l'importance qu'il mérite. »
languages.original_text: "I will find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, will mark its significance as it deserves."

traits.locale_text: « Je lui trouverai une place de choix dans ma collection et je le préserverai de tout changement pour les siècles à venir. Vous, ainsi que toute votre espèce, pouvez à peine mesurer la valeur de ce phénomène. Pour ma part, je saurai lui donner l'importance qu'il mérite. »

languages.text: «Le buscaré un lugar digno en mi colección y lo preservaré intacto durante los siglos venideros. Tú y los tuyos apenas alcanzáis a entender el valor de este fenómeno. Yo, sin embargo, haré constar su trascendencia como merece».
languages.original_text: "I will find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, will mark its significance as it deserves."

traits.locale_text: «Le buscaré un lugar digno en mi colección y lo preservaré intacto durante los siglos venideros. Tú y los tuyos apenas alcanzáis a entender el valor de este fenómeno. Yo, sin embargo, haré constar su trascendencia como merece».

languages.text: "Koleksiyonumda ona layık bir yer bulacak ve onu yüzyıllar boyunca değişmeden koruyacağım. Sen ve senin türünden diğerleri, bu fenomenin değerini zar zor kavrıyorsunuz. Bense hak ettiği gibi onun önemine işaret edeceğim."
languages.original_text: "I will find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, will mark its significance as it deserves."

traits.locale_text: "Koleksiyonumda ona layık bir yer bulacak ve onu yüzyıllar boyunca değişmeden koruyacağım. Sen ve senin türünden diğerleri, bu fenomenin değerini zar zor kavrıyorsunuz. Bense hak ettiği gibi onun önemine işaret edeceğim."

languages.text: 「この現象の価値は、あなたたちのような人間には理解できないでしょう。しかし、私はこの現象の価値をきちんと評価し、私のコレクションの中で、この現象にふさわしい場所を見つけて、何世紀にもわたってこの現象をそのまま保存します。」
languages.original_text: "I will find a worthy place for it within my collection and preserve it unchanged for centuries to come. You and others of your kind can scarcely comprehend the value of this phenomenon. I, however, will mark its significance as it deserves."

traits.locale_text: 「この現象の価値は、あなたたちのような人間には理解できないでしょう。しかし、私はこの現象の価値をきちんと評価し、私のコレクションの中で、この現象にふさわしい場所を見つけて、何世紀にもわたってこの現象をそのまま保存します。」
